programme.title: Surfing Australia TV
programme.desc: Showcases Surfing Australia's programs from junior development through to the elite athletes in surfing.

programme.title: Formula E : Highlights
programme.desc: Formula E is more than a just a racing series. Radical cars, all powered by electricity, pave the way for the road cars of tomorrow, with the series acting as a competitive platform to test and develop the latest in electric technology.

programme.title: Lego Masters
programme.desc: Today our teams are put to the test, challenged to build what their vision of the future is, but seen through the view of a window frame.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Fran discovers her new boyfriend has a secret which could cost Maxwell a fortune.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: It's Sylvia's birthday and Fran and CC find themselves locked in Maxwell's wine cellar.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Elaine keeps getting dragged to see the The English Patient even though she absolutely hates the film. A gorgeous woman mistakes George for her boyfriend, Neil. Jerry takes on The Mandelbaum Boys.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George is tired and needs to take a nap at work, so he naps under his desk and Kramer takes up swimming in the East River.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester hopes to shed a few pounds before his pen pal arrives.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Discovering a treasure map in the sea chest of Great Grandfather Peg-Leg Addams the pirate, Gomez and Morticia decide to hire a boat to go look for it.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Serena turns Darrin's mother into a cat.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Serena wants to try mortal men and gets a date through a computer dating service.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Maxwell and Fran face a difference in opinion on how to raise the children when Maxwell reverses a decision Fran made regarding not allowing Brighton to go to the mall.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Maggie is upset when Fran inherits a mink coat. Fran decides to give it up to appease Maggie, but Sylvia won't hear of it.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George's new flame keeps including \.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Kramer prepares for his millennium party, Jerry jockeys for position on his girlfriend's speed dial, Elaine gets irked by an inattentive saleswoman, and George tries to get sacked by The Yankees.

programme.title: Police Academy
programme.desc: As a crime wave sweeps the city and the police department suffers a shortage of officers, the mayor decrees that admission to the Police Academy will be open to any and all applicants. Now the first cadets, a collection of oddballs, eccentrics and misfits will soon be let loose on the streets. That is if they somehow manage to graduate in this worldwide hit comedy that started the series of Police Academy films.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George's new flame keeps including \.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Kramer prepares for his millennium party, Jerry jockeys for position on his girlfriend's speed dial, Elaine gets irked by an inattentive saleswoman, and George tries to get sacked by The Yankees.

programme.title: The 100
programme.desc: Struggling to survive alone in a world scorched by Praimfaya, Clarke makes a startling discovery -- and faces a dangerous new threat.

programme.title: Love Island UK: All Stars
programme.desc: It's that time again--all the naughtiest, funniest and unbelievable unseen bits from the Love Island All Stars.

programme.title: The Real Housewives Of Durban
programme.desc: The two camps continue to enjoy their holiday separately, cementing the divide in the group. Following the events of dinner, Angel attempts to apologize to Maria, while a skeptical Ameigh investigates what is on that recording.

programme.title: Lego Masters Australia
programme.sub-title: Dragon Race and Grandscapes - The Second Elimination
programme.desc: Tonight, our seven teams are first challenged to build tiny dragons that are small enough to fly on a drone, the winner gets an advantage for the second build which is Grandscapes,where another team will be eliminated this series.

programme.title: Barbie: Dreamhouse Adventures
programme.desc: Barbie embarks on adventures with friends and family -- including next-door neighbour Ken -- in this animated vlog of adventures filmed inside her family's new dreamhouse.

programme.title: Barney's World
programme.desc: When Vivie feels ignored, she fakes an injury and Barney helps her learn the importance in speaking up for herself. / Mel is frustrated at how long her broken arm is taking to heal, so Barney helps her understand that some things take time.

programme.title: LEGO DreamZzz
programme.desc: After locating Lunia’s hourglass, the team heads to the dream world’s sun, which holds more secrets than the object they’re searching for!

programme.title: Bubble's Hotel
programme.sub-title: Luck Is In The Air/Too Chicken to Fly/Oodles of Noodles
programme.desc: When Bubble loses a guest's lucky pendant, she struggles to confess to her mistake. / Bubble's guest, a kung fu master, asks Chef Pepper to teach her how to make her grandma's legendary noodle recipe.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Quadstrike
programme.desc: The Bladers take a quick snack break. Jiji comes to the rescue with his signature scrumptious feast. Xander presents Bel with a challenge over who gets Jiji to stay with them.

programme.title: Beyblade X
programme.desc: Omega Shiroboshi has announced that a Star Battle is about to begin, and the Bladers of X City, both professional and amateur, are excited. Tenka asks Ekusu Kurosu for help in defeating Omega. Bird seems dissatisfied with Ekusu's enthusiasm. However, in order to have the chance to challenge Team Zodiac, Persona also decides to take part in the Star Battle. Among the teams that Tenka choose as her first opponents was a familiar face. On the other hand, something unusual happens to Ekusu. And so Team Persona's first battle begins!

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures
programme.sub-title: Doorman Of The City/Fendrich In The Wild
programme.desc: It's \.

programme.title: Barbie: Dreamhouse Adventures
programme.desc: Trey injures himself on the Roberts' property, so the family nurses their demanding neighbour until Barbie realizes Trey may be up to something.

programme.title: Theatre Dome
programme.desc: Welcome to the TheatreDome where two teams are battling for eternal acting glory! Glow sticks, frisbees, and worms - oh my! Who can turn this pile of junk into an invention worthy of the win?

programme.title: LEGO DreamZzz
programme.desc: Mateo is saved by Z-Blob who has returned to unbox him from Dreamsmasher’s prison. The two dream chasers unbox the rest of their team and wreak havoc in the GLOWING ORB in order to try and retrieve Lunia’s hourglass and save the dream world from harm. But not everything is as it appears, as Mateo’s plan seems to go more smoothly than he had imagined.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Maxwell and Fran face a difference in opinion on how to raise the children when Maxwell reverses a decision Fran made regarding not allowing Brighton to go to the mall.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Maggie is upset when Fran inherits a mink coat. Fran decides to give it up to appease Maggie, but Sylvia won't hear of it.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester hopes to shed a few pounds before his pen pal arrives.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Discovering a treasure map in the sea chest of Great Grandfather Peg-Leg Addams the pirate, Gomez and Morticia decide to hire a boat to go look for it.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Serena turns Darrin's mother into a cat.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Serena wants to try mortal men and gets a date through a computer dating service.

programme.title: My Way
programme.desc: Tim Blackwell introduces inspirational Aussies, each with a unique story about how they live their best life. It's a lifestyle program that allows people to tell their own stories firsthand to say, 'I'm doing this My Way'.

programme.title: Lego Masters
programme.desc: In the lead up to finals week and a known elimination, teams must build their creations on a rotating baseplate, that reveals a story in three different parts encompassing a beginning, middle and end.

programme.title: Lego Masters
programme.desc: Teams are given a LEGO cloud and have fourteen hours to create something that belongs on that cloud, with one team being eliminated at the end and the three remaining teams will compete in the final.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Maxwell and Fran face a difference in opinion on how to raise the children when Maxwell reverses a decision Fran made regarding not allowing Brighton to go to the mall.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Maggie is upset when Fran inherits a mink coat. Fran decides to give it up to appease Maggie, but Sylvia won't hear of it.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George's new flame keeps including \.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Kramer prepares for his millennium party, Jerry jockeys for position on his girlfriend's speed dial, Elaine gets irked by an inattentive saleswoman, and George tries to get sacked by The Yankees.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia brings a new beau to show off, but the Addams believe him to be a fraud.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley wants to find a job to the horror of his parents.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Tabitha turns an ape into a human who immediately gets a job as a model.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: The Stevens' insist that their grandchild, Tabitha, spend the weekend with them. To avert any magical disasters, Samantha and Endora join them.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Maxwell and Fran face a difference in opinion on how to raise the children when Maxwell reverses a decision Fran made regarding not allowing Brighton to go to the mall.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Maxwell tries to keep Fran from learning the identity of his celebrity house guest.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Elaine and a former boss join forces in a muffin top business; George pretends to be a tourist in order to get a date.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: During a summer out of work, George acts as Jerry's dating intern. Elaine’s co-worker won't swing her arms. Kramer's a seat filler at the Tony Awards.

programme.title: Flight Of The Navigator
programme.desc: David Freeman is an ordinary boy destined for a most extraordinary adventure aboard a spectacular, futuristic spacecraft. After a mystifying disappearance, David returns possessing vast, undiscovered knowledge about the farthest reaches of the universe. With these sudden navigational powers, David is able to take the fantastic flying machine anywhere he desires, accompanied by both its wisecracking robotic commander, Max, and an assortment of bizarre extraterrestrial creatures.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Elaine and a former boss join forces in a muffin top business; George pretends to be a tourist in order to get a date.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: During a summer out of work, George acts as Jerry's dating intern. Elaine’s co-worker won't swing her arms. Kramer's a seat filler at the Tony Awards.

programme.title: Rugby Heaven
programme.desc: Your one-stop rugby shop. This fast-paced show touches on the biggest talking points in the game - the latest breaking news, analysis, exclusive interviews, feature stories and special guests.

programme.title: Love Island UK: All Stars
programme.desc: It's getting hot out here. There's a game of Truth or Dare between Tom and Georgia S, two lovers head to the hideaway, and two more prepare for a first date. Turn up the steam.

programme.title: The Real Housewives Of Durban
programme.desc: The ladies are back home and Maria catches Neil up on everything that took place on the trip. Ameigh plans her event, uncertain who will be attending while Slee wants to bury the hatchet with Maria.

programme.title: Lego Masters
programme.desc: In this Spooktacular episode, the six remaining teams will have 10 hours to embrace their dark side and complete their 'Spooky' builds.

programme.title: Cards And Collectables Australia
programme.desc: An epic Nintendo collection that would impress Mario himself, Vintage footy cards from over a century ago and how a master set collector turned his passion into a thriving business.

programme.title: Barbie: Dreamhouse Adventures
programme.desc: Trey injures himself on the Roberts' property, so the family nurses their demanding neighbour until Barbie realizes Trey may be up to something.

programme.title: Barney's World
programme.desc: Vivie's upset when her painting gets ruined so Barney takes the kids on a high-seas adventure to help Vivie learn healthy ways to manage big feelings. / Barney shows Mel the importance of respecting nature.

programme.title: LEGO DreamZzz
programme.desc: Mateo is saved by Z-Blob who has returned to unbox him from Dreamsmasher’s prison. The two dream chasers unbox the rest of their team and wreak havoc in the GLOWING ORB in order to try and retrieve Lunia’s hourglass and save the dream world from harm. But not everything is as it appears, as Mateo’s plan seems to go more smoothly than he had imagined.

programme.title: Bubble's Hotel
programme.sub-title: Fly Fly Away/ And Baby Makes Seven/Delicate Problem/Beach Burglar
programme.desc: When Bubble learns that her guest Dash has butterfly-phobia, she endeavours to help Dash overcome her fears. / Bubble helps Lotus protect her precious rare coral plant from a destructive seahorse.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Quadstrike
programme.desc: What exactly is a battle camp? Well, Bel, Ranzo, and Pri are about to find out because they've been invited to Battle Island where rookie Bladers from all over have gathered to train and compete!

programme.title: Beyblade X
programme.desc: The First Battle of Persona vs. Gordias is a leader match between Robin and Karla. The curse Reiyu placed on Robin crosses the back of his mind...! Tenka discloses the truth behind the curse.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures
programme.desc: Teenage superstar, Poppy Starr, visits her grandfather, Sargent Sam Grizzled. Billy and Madison lose a flying disc inside a creepy-looking house.

programme.title: Barbie: Dreamhouse Adventures
programme.desc: Barbie and her friends try to wow Nikki's fashion idol at a mermaid convention, but things take a fishy turn when Barbie's sisters become suspects in a mystery.

programme.title: Theatre Dome
programme.sub-title: I'm Fishy Fish They Call Me the F-Double
programme.desc: Welcome to the TheatreDome where two teams are battling for eternal acting glory! Pack your snorkels, as the Overseer demands an aquarium rap battle! Will our players sink or swim?

programme.title: LEGO DreamZzz
programme.desc: When the Berlin Bright Bureau receives a package containing Happy App Goggles, they happily accept the opportunity to beta test the devices. After all, the goggles are said to make dreaming more efficient! However, the agents are now trapped within Happy App's trap! Now Astrid must find a way to free her colleagues and battle a mysterious foe in order to free everyone from this new enemy.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Maxwell and Fran face a difference in opinion on how to raise the children when Maxwell reverses a decision Fran made regarding not allowing Brighton to go to the mall.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Maxwell tries to keep Fran from learning the identity of his celebrity house guest.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia brings a new beau to show off, but the Addams believe him to be a fraud.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley wants to find a job to the horror of his parents.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Tabitha turns an ape into a human who immediately gets a job as a model.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: The Stevens' insist that their grandchild, Tabitha, spend the weekend with them. To avert any magical disasters, Samantha and Endora join them.

programme.title: Rugby Heaven
programme.desc: Your one-stop rugby shop. This fast-paced show touches on the biggest talking points in the game - the latest breaking news, analysis, exclusive interviews, feature stories and special guests.

programme.title: Premier League Stories
programme.desc: Showcasing the personalities who have shaped the Premier League era, PL Stories focuses on the stories that engage fans and capture the hearts and minds of audiences worldwide.

programme.title: Lego Masters
programme.desc: The three remaining teams will have 28 hours to build whatever they want, in order to impress Brickman and the 200 members of the public that will have their chance to vote for the winner.
